title: Agent Configuration
description: JSON Schema for economist-agents YAML agent configuration files

role.description: Short role title for the agent

backstory.description: Background context that shapes the agent's persona

system_message.description: Full system prompt sent to the LLM

trend_system_message.description: Optional secondary prompt (used by topic_scout for trend research)

tools.description: List of tool names available to this agent

weight.description: Voting weight for editorial board agents (default 1.0)

version.description: Semantic version of this agent config

author.description: Author or team that owns this agent config

category.description: Pipeline stage this agent belongs to
